LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH RECITES ALL THE TERMS OF RELIEF MADE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for petitioner is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and a proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
